body: This PR moves everything related to restart files into `driver.jl`. It also cleans up some variable names and clarifies exactly what needs to be defined in each test case file for `driver.jl` to work.
title: Reorganize driver

body:
Adds density current example (plane configuration). Constant coefficient, Laplacian viscosity applied as diffusion mechanism. Hyperdiffusion turned off in default configuration for these examples. 

Closes #577
title: Add density current ( falling bubble example) with Laplacian diffusion
